content: Life360 faces sustained 2024-2026 teen backlash ('digital leash', #Life360Overstep) over one-directional surveillance with no visibility into who is watching, plus a Markup investigation into location-data sales to brokers. New privacy-forward entrants (HeyPolo by Surfshark, Paralino) position explicitly against Life360 on this exact axis. Glympse has a 'Tracking View Statistics' feature showing who viewed your shared location. This validates mutual-visibility/no-data-resale as a real, differentiating market response, not a hypothetical.
